productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Stripes Yellow Polo Tshirt
description: Composition Yellow and black striped T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a polo neck with a white collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, concealed chest button placket, embroidered and appliqued branding on the left chest, and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with similar colours Tumble dry low Medium iron; do not iron on decorations Radiate charm and style in this trendy T-shirt from US Polo. The stripes and vibrant colours are an eye-catcher, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans or layer it under a cardigan for instant throw-on-and-go style. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6', shoulders 18"
